Compassionate, evidence-based psychotherapy & wellness coaching in Gurgaon, Delhi & online. Begin your journey to clarity, peace and lasting balance.

Get Free ConsultationExplore Services

Online Counselling

Experience professional support from the comfort of your home with our online psychotherapy sessions in Gurgaon and Delhi. As the Best Psychologist in Gurgaon, I offer affordable online therapy to help you navigate anxiety, depression, and stress.

Learn more →

Individual & Group Therapy

Unlock personal growth through individual therapy or our group sessions. As the Top Psychotherapist in Gurgaon and Delhi, I specialize in cognitive behavioral therapy to address your unique needs.

Learn more →

Corporate Wellness

Enhance your team's productivity with our corporate wellness programs. As the Best Wellness Coach for Executives, I provide executive stress management coaching in Gurgaon.

Learn more →

Welcome to Kavita Kabira Wellness Clinic

The Leading Psychology
& Wellness Clinic

In today’s rapidly evolving society, many people face complex mental health challenges that can be overwhelming. Recognizing that mental well-being is a significant concern, it’s crucial to seek support from professionals like the Best Psychologist in Gurgaon to navigate these issues.

Acknowledging this essential need, we have established a dedicated psychological practice. As the Top Psychotherapist in Gurgaon and Delhi, we offer comprehensive counseling and therapy services to support your mental health. Committed to accessibility, we strive to be an affordable psychologist for everyone seeking guidance.

Call us 24/7. We can answer all your questions.

Read More

Our Services

Your Right Choice

At Kavita Kabira Wellness Clinic, we are dedicated to providing holistic and compassionate mental health care. Dr. Kavita Kabira is here to guide you through life’s challenges with empathy and expertise.

View all services

Panic

Features

Calming techniques and CBT-based therapy to overcome panic attacks and anxiety triggers.

Read more

Neurosis

Features

Compassionate care for chronic anxiety, obsessive thoughts and emotional distress.

Read more

Disturbance

Features

Treatment for emotional disturbances, mood swings and sleep difficulties.

Read more

Client Reviews

“Dr. Kavita Kabira is a renowned psychologist and mental health expert who delivers exceptional therapeutic services. As a highly skilled inner child healing specialist, Dr. Kavita Kabira brings not only depth, empathy, and expertise to her practice, but also a sense of humor and charm that fosters trust and comfort in her clients. I highly recommend Dr. Kavita Kabira to anyone seeking professional mental health therapy, emotional healing, or trauma recovery services.”

Lata Bala

Single Mother

How to catch the happiness

10 Quarantine Activities That Don’t Involve Watching the News

Today, it feels like everything has changed—it's either been closed, postponed, or canceled. Limiting news intake can dramatically improve mental wellbeing.

Politeness in long-term relationships may seem unnecessary, but research suggests these small phrases create big emotional safety.
